title: [Control systems] ABB security advisory (AV26-303)
description: On March 31, 2026, ABB published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following product:
products: ABB Batch Management  version 6.2 and prior
ABB Production Response Batch History  version 6.2 and prior
ABB 800xA for Symphony Plus Harmony  version 6.2 and prior
ABB 800xA for AC 870P Melody  version 6.2 and prior
ABB Application Change Management  version 6.2 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
